# CE4011 member-load example: single frame element with local-y point load.
# Negative local_y is downward for this horizontal member.

MATERIAL steel E=200000000000 alpha=1.2e-5
SECTION beam A=0.02 I=8e-5 d=0.4

NODE 1 0 0 FIX FIX FREE
NODE 2 5 0 FREE FIX FREE

FRAME 1 1 2 steel beam
MEMBER_LOAD 1 TYPE=POINT DIR=LOCAL_Y P=-20000 A=2.5
